The Estate

Central Florida's Hidden Jewel

Indian Lake Estates is a gated private community set midway between the Atlantic Ocean and Gulf of Mexico — a 7,500-acre sanctuary surrounding Lake Walk-in-Water, Polk County's largest and most celebrated fishing lake.

Originally envisioned as Florida's most exclusive residential enclave, the community features 200+ miles of roads, a marina, country club, interfaith worship houses, dining, fitness, and world-class outdoor recreation — all within your private gates.

✦Gated 24-hour community ✦No CDD fees ✦Golf carts welcome ✦Owner financed by MAQ
POLK COUNTY, FL

Spiritual Life

An Interfaith Community
for All Residents

Indian Lake Estates embraces residents of all faiths. Our community is home to both a Christian church and a mosque — fostering unity, peace, and spiritual belonging for every family.

Community Church

A welcoming interfaith Christian house of worship within the community — providing spiritual grounding, Sunday services, and community fellowship for all denominations.

Sunday worship services and weekday prayer
Holiday celebrations and community events
Open to all Christian denominations
Pastoral care and grief support
Open to All Denominations

Community Mosque

A peaceful house of worship serving the Muslim residents of Indian Lake Estates — a rare and cherished feature that makes this community truly unique among Florida's gated enclaves.

Five daily prayers (Salah) and Jumu'ah
Ramadan gatherings and Eid celebrations
Halal-conscious community culture
Youth Islamic education programs
Unique in Central Florida
" Indian Lake Estates is one of the very few communities in Florida where neighbors of different faiths live, work, and worship side by side — sharing the peace of this lakeside sanctuary. "
